column1: The weather is different here in August. It is much_____________and_____________. (SUNNY/WARM)
Which is__________: this house or that one. (BIG)
The teacher asked me if I had read the_____________part of Chapter__________ . (ONE/FOUR)
To answer those questions, you should listen____________ . (CAREFUL)
He was the____________child in a family of___________children. (TWO/SIX)
